summary: DHH announces that The Robot Co-op has hired Ruby developer Eric Hodel to work with Ruby on Rails on their upcoming product. He celebrates this as a sign of growing commercial adoption of Ruby and Rails, and expresses enthusiasm about companies hiring from within the Ruby community.
key_points: The Robot Co-op hired Eric Hodel, a Borges developer, to work with Ruby on Rails
DHH sees this as validation of Ruby's growing adoption in the commercial space
He highlights the importance of companies hiring developers from within the existing Ruby community
money_quotes: It's wonderful to see more companies get on the Ruby train and especially when they're hiring within the community as well.
key_insight: Early commercial adoption of Ruby on Rails, with companies hiring from within the Ruby community, signaled the framework's growing viability as a real business tool.
